title: Archived: Guidance for transparent medical mask technical specifications: Technical requirements for manufacturers - Canada.ca

## Archived: Guidance for transparent medical mask technical specifications: Technical requirements for manufacturers
- Technical requirements for manufacturers
To claim that the mask is a transparent medical mask, the manufacturer must be able to:
- meet ASTM F2100 level 1, 2 or 3 specifications, or EN 14683 Type IIR or comparable standards for medical mask materials
- provide differential pressure and filtration efficiency measurements for the entire transparent medical mask
- substantiate any additional claims that go beyond the standard testing for medical masks (for example, antimicrobial )
The following table summarizes the ASTM F2100 and EN 14683 requirements for medical masks (source: Buy and Sell website ).
Typical Canada/US ASTM F2100
Bacterial filtration efficiency, %
Differential pressure mm H20/cm 2 (Pa/cm 2 )
Submicron particulate filtration efficiency at 0.1 micron, %
Splash resistance/synthetic blood resistance, mmHG
Microbial cleanliness (cfu/g)
